commits.subject: Day 117 (18:11): Fix state doctor test discoverability for event scanning limit (Task 2)

eval.reason: `cargo test -- doctor` finds 11 tests (all pass), including the two renamed tests that verify the 20K event tail scanning limit. The rename approach makes the existing helper tests discoverable by the "doctor" filter. Build and full test suite are green.
